summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TaskFlow team collaboration and notification features. All core team functionality working including team creation, member management, team task assignment, notifications, reminders, and push integration endpoints.

integration_issues.issue: Team assignment scope selector not always visible when creating team tasks - assignment options may not load properly in task editor modal

passed_tests: Backend: Teams CRUD operations (create, list, view detail)
Backend: Team member management (add by email, update role, remove)
Backend: Team invite system with invited/active status
Backend: Team task creation with team_id assignment
Backend: Task assignment to team members with persistence
Backend: Task permission system (admin-only assignment changes)
Backend: Notification system (list, mark read, process reminders)
Backend: Auto reminder setting (due_at - 2h when reminder_at omitted)
Frontend: Teams page with team creation and member management UI
Frontend: Team member addition with email and role selection
Frontend: Team detail view showing role and member list
Frontend: Task assignment notifications generated and displayed in UI
Frontend: Notifications settings page with push controls
Frontend: Reminder policy display (2 hours before due date)
Frontend: Team filtering available in tasks list and kanban board
Frontend: Assignment filtering ('Assigned to me' option)
Frontend: Dashboard integration with team task counts
Frontend: Navigation between all team-related pages
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor UI issue: Task editor assignment scope selector may not always load properly when creating team tasks. The team assignment functionality works but the UI controls for selecting assignment scope (whole team vs specific members) may not be visible consistently in the task editor modal.
